content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

September 9, 1991

Paul Herman  
Treasurer for Carole Migden  
Board of Supervisors  
City & County of San Francisco  
Room 235, City Hall  
San Francisco, CA 94102

Re: Your Request for Advice.  
Our File No. A-91-384

Dear Mr. Herman:

During our recent telephone conversation, you asked if San Francisco Supervisor Carole Migden could transfer campaign funds from her candidate or officeholder campaign bank accounts to other candidates' accounts.

The enclosed advice letter written to Kirk Pessner on behalf of San Francisco Mayor Art Agnos summarizes the current status of Section 85304 of the Political Reform Act after the court ruling in Service Employees International Union, AFL-CIO, et al. v. Fair Political Practices Commission (1990) 747 F.Supp. 580. This advice letter, dated July 19, 1991, specifically addresses your questions regarding transferring funds.

If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Linda Moureaux  
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosures
